name: Vitamune CDZ
description: Vitamune CDZ is an immunity booster beverage rich in Vitamin C, D and Zinc-enriched probiotics. It is a combination of Acerola, Camu Camu, Amla, Vitamin D3 & Zinc-enriched Bifidobacterium longum CCFM1195. This formulation works synergistically to form a protection layer against viral infection.
benefits: Natural vitamin C, D, Zinc with probiotics
Organic zinc from zinc-enriched Bifidobacterium longum CCFM1195
Reduce severity of symptoms and complications during infection

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet daily mixed in 125ml water or juice (below 50°C)
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet in 125ml (1/2 cup) water or juice

ingredients: Zinc enriched friendly bacteria powder (Bifidobacterium longum CCFM1195)
who_can_consume: Adults and children seeking immune support, especially during cold and flu season.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or immunocompromised.

qa.question: What is the difference between natural and synthetic Vitamin C?
qa.answer: Natural Vitamin C is extracted from whole foods (acerola berries, camu-camu, Amla) containing co-factors like bioflavonoids, rutin, Factor J, K, P, Tyrosinase, and Ascorbinogen. Synthetic Vitamin C is chemically manufactured from corn sugar where ascorbic acid is only a small fraction of the complete vitamin C complex.

qa.question: Why combine Vitamin C, D & Zinc?
qa.answer: These nutrients work synergistically to strengthen the immune system. Zinc helps develop and activate T-lymphocytes, Vitamin D supports production of germ-fighting proteins, and Vitamin C helps fight bugs/viruses and can shorten cold duration and severity.
